sn45.23:1.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, I will teach you the wrong way and the right way. Listen to that …
sn45.23:1.2: "And what, bhikkhus, is the wrong way? It is: wrong view … wrong concentration. This is called the wrong way.
sn45.23:1.3: "And what, bhikkhus, is the right way? It is: right view … right concentration. This is called the right way."
